generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion360 for crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance ArcadiaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia model created using Capella for MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor readings and control commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for dashboard and trajectory traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hardware control platform for sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, Electromagnet
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModel
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE modeling tool for Arcadia models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArcadiaModel
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model-based optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor readings and control commands to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes trajectory traces and validation results via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real trajectories with simulations via distance metrics for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane and controller dynamics for virtual commissioning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generated for crane movement"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data available for analysis"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces on dashboard"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts operators when discrepancies exceed thresholds"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for crane dynamics"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection alerts for maintenance"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables maintenance decisions without direct physical control"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance StepperMotorCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance StepperMotorHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at end of hoist for container pickup"
]

instance DatabaseContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB container for data storage"
]

instance DashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard container for visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for trajectory generation service"
]

instance SimulationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for simulation service"
]

instance ContinuousValidationServiceContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Container for continuous validation service"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker container"
]

instance CraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, Electromagnet, DatabaseContainer, DashboardContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorServiceContainer, SimulationServiceContainer, ContinuousValidationServiceContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application sent via Physical Crane Interface to motors and electromagnet for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization; data logging and validation occur without fixed intervals, with services operating in near real-time during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via MQTT Broker connecting physical containers (Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI) and digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation), with data flow through TimescaleDB and real-time signaling."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as operated' phase of the physical crane during operational use, with continuous validation and fault detection applied to real-time operational data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares real trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against predefined thresholds; threshold breaches trigger operator notifications for validation checks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; data transmission between physical and digital components via MQTT topics and TimescaleDB."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard; gantrylib Python module installed via pip on a personal computer; docker-compose for unified deployment."
]
